description: Full-fidelity network engineering view – top talkers, interface health, flow trends, alert timelines

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(DISTINCT device_serial) AS value FROM network_observability.devices WHERE device_name != '' AND match(device_name, '${device:pipe}')
SELECT count() AS value FROM network_observability.device_interfaces WHERE device_name != '' AND oper_status_up = true AND match(device_name, '${device:pipe}')
SELECT count() AS value FROM network_observability.device_interfaces WHERE device_name != '' AND oper_status_up = false AND admin_status_up = true AND match(device_name, '${device:pipe}')

SELECT count() AS value FROM (
    SELECT alert_type, device_serial, interface_name, policy,
        argMax(resolution, timestamp) AS ares,
        argMax(device_display, timestamp) AS adevice
    FROM livenx_modeldb.Structured_Events
    WHERE alert_type IN ('DEVICE_DOWN','DEVICE_MEM','DEVICE_CPU','INTERFACE_UTILIZATION','VOICE_VIDEO')
    GROUP BY alert_type, device_serial, interface_name, policy
    HAVING ares = false
)
WHERE match(adevice, '${device:pipe}')
  AND match(alert_type, '${alert_type:pipe}')

SELECT count() AS value FROM (
    SELECT alert_type, device_serial, interface_name, policy,
        argMax(resolution, timestamp) AS ares,
        argMax(severity_text, timestamp) AS aseverity,
        argMax(device_display, timestamp) AS adevice
    FROM livenx_modeldb.Structured_Events
    WHERE alert_type IN ('DEVICE_DOWN','DEVICE_MEM','DEVICE_CPU','INTERFACE_UTILIZATION','VOICE_VIDEO')
    GROUP BY alert_type, device_serial, interface_name, policy
    HAVING ares = false
)
WHERE aseverity = 'Critical'
  AND match(adevice, '${device:pipe}')
SELECT sum(sum_octets) AS value FROM network_observability.basic_ipfix_flows_5m WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND match(device_site_name, '${site:pipe}')

SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 6 HOUR) AS time,
    severity_text AS severity,
    count() AS cnt
FROM livenx_modeldb.Structured_Events
WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY
  AND alert_type IN ('DEVICE_DOWN','DEVICE_MEM','DEVICE_CPU','INTERFACE_UTILIZATION','VOICE_VIDEO')
  AND match(device_display, '${device:pipe}')
  AND match(alert_type, '${alert_type:pipe}')
GROUP BY time, severity_text
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT alert_type AS alert_type, count() AS count
FROM (
    SELECT alert_type, device_serial, interface_name, policy,
        argMax(resolution, timestamp) AS ares,
        argMax(device_display, timestamp) AS adevice
    FROM livenx_modeldb.Structured_Events
    WHERE alert_type IN ('DEVICE_DOWN','DEVICE_MEM','DEVICE_CPU','INTERFACE_UTILIZATION','VOICE_VIDEO')
    GROUP BY alert_type, device_serial, interface_name, policy
    HAVING ares = false
)
WHERE match(adevice, '${device:pipe}')
  AND match(alert_type, '${alert_type:pipe}')
GROUP BY alert_type
ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT
    application_name AS application,
    sum(sum_octets)  AS total_bytes
FROM network_observability.basic_ipfix_flows_5m
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND application_name != ''
  AND match(device_site_name, '${site:pipe}')
GROUP BY application_name
ORDER BY total_bytes DESC
LIMIT 15

WITH
    coalesce(nullIf(toString(source_ipv4),''), nullIf(toString(source_ipv6),''), '(unknown)') AS src,
    coalesce(nullIf(toString(dest_ipv4),''),   nullIf(toString(dest_ipv6),''),   '(unknown)') AS dst
SELECT
    concat(src, ' → ', dst) AS conversation,
    sum(sum_octets) AS total_bytes
FROM network_observability.ip_port_to_ip_port_basic_flows_with_device
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND match(device_name, '${device:pipe}')
GROUP BY conversation
ORDER BY total_bytes DESC
LIMIT 15

SELECT
    concat(device_name, ' – ', ifNull(tags['description'], ifNull(tags['ifName'], '(unknown)'))) AS interface,
    sum(toFloat64(metric_value)) AS total_bytes
FROM network_observability.device_snmp_and_api_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND metric_name = 'inBytes'
  AND metric_value IS NOT NULL
  AND match(device_name, '${device:pipe}')
GROUP BY interface
ORDER BY total_bytes DESC
LIMIT 15

SELECT
    device_name AS device,
    ifNull(tags['description'], ifNull(tags['ifName'], '(unknown)')) AS ifname,
    sumIf(toFloat64(metric_value), metric_name = 'inErrors')    AS in_errors,
    sumIf(toFloat64(metric_value), metric_name = 'outErrors')   AS out_errors,
    sumIf(toFloat64(metric_value), metric_name = 'inDiscards')  AS in_discards,
    sumIf(toFloat64(metric_value), metric_name = 'outDiscards') AS out_discards
FROM network_observability.device_snmp_and_api_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND metric_name IN ('inErrors','outErrors','inDiscards','outDiscards')
  AND match(device_name, '${device:pipe}')
GROUP BY device, ifname
HAVING (in_errors + out_errors + in_discards + out_discards) > 0
ORDER BY (in_errors + out_errors) DESC
LIMIT 50

SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(time, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) AS time,
    sum(if(flow_direction = 0, sum_octets, 0)) / 300 AS Inbound,
    sum(if(flow_direction = 1, sum_octets, 0)) / 300 AS Outbound
FROM network_observability.basic_ipfix_flows_5m
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND match(device_site_name, '${site:pipe}')
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT
    device_site_name AS site,
    sum(sum_flow_count) AS flow_count
FROM network_observability.basic_ipfix_flows_5m
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND device_site_name != ''
  AND match(device_site_name, '${site:pipe}')
GROUP BY device_site_name
ORDER BY flow_count DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(time, INTERVAL 15 MINUTE) AS time,
    device_name,
    round(avg(value), 1) AS value
FROM network_observability.device_health_timeseries
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND metric = 'cpu.utilization_pct'
  AND device_name != ''
  AND match(device_name, '${device:pipe}')
GROUP BY time, device_name
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(time, INTERVAL 15 MINUTE) AS time,
    device_name,
    round(avg(value), 1) AS value
FROM network_observability.device_health_timeseries
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND metric = 'memory.utilization_pct'
  AND device_name != ''
  AND match(device_name, '${device:pipe}')
GROUP BY time, device_name
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT
    device_site_name AS site,
    sum(sum_octets) AS total_bytes,
    sum(sum_octets) / 300 AS bytes_per_sec,
    sum(sum_flow_count) AS flow_count,
    round(sum(sum_packets) / 1000000, 2) AS packets_m,
    argMax(application_name, sum_octets) AS top_app
FROM network_observability.basic_ipfix_flows_5m
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND device_site_name != ''
  AND match(device_site_name, '${site:pipe}')
GROUP BY device_site_name
ORDER BY total_bytes DESC
LIMIT 50

SELECT
    min(timestamp)         AS first_seen,
    max(timestamp)         AS last_seen,
    argMax(severity_text,  timestamp) AS aseverity,
    argMax(alert_type,     timestamp) AS atype,
    argMax(title,          timestamp) AS atitle,
    argMax(device_display, timestamp) AS adevice,
    argMax(site_display,   timestamp) AS asite,
    argMax(interface_name, timestamp) AS ainterface,
    argMax(message,        timestamp) AS amessage,
    argMax(resolution,     timestamp) AS ares
FROM livenx_modeldb.Structured_Events
WHERE alert_type IN ('DEVICE_DOWN','DEVICE_MEM','DEVICE_CPU','INTERFACE_UTILIZATION','VOICE_VIDEO')
GROUP BY alert_type, device_serial, interface_name, policy
HAVING ares = false
  AND match(adevice, '${device:pipe}')
  AND match(asite,   '${site:pipe}')
  AND match(atype,   '${alert_type:pipe}')
ORDER BY last_seen DESC
LIMIT 200

list.label: Site
list.name: site
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT site_name FROM network_observability.sites WHERE site_name != '' ORDER BY site_name

list.label: Device
list.name: device
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT device_name FROM network_observability.devices WHERE device_name != '' ORDER BY device_name

title: Engineering Dashboard
